case_title: WILLIAM H SIGMAN VS. SULPICIO MARIANO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-16-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIGMAN, WILLIAM H IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MARIANO, SULPICIO THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY PLAINTIFF DOES NOT SUPPORT PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS AGAINST THE DEFENDANT BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-16-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-16-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFWILLIAM SIGMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SULPICIO MARIANO IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
